block_00: 2 Indicators That Are Meant for Each Other
block_01: There are indicators that, when combined, form A-OK trading systems and then there are indicators that are truly meant for each other. Highest High and Lowest Low are just like that.
block_02: When used simultaneously, these two indicators turn into a technical analysis powerhouse that can help you identify entry and exit points for any asset and any time frame.
block_04: Why Traders Lose? Trading Mistakes You Don’t Want to Make
block_05: Some trading mistakes are painfully costly and can deplete your account in no time. Learn about five common trading mistakes and ways to avoid them.
block_08: What makes a great trader? Personality is as important as experience and skills. We’ve singled out 5 traits that most successful traders share.
